violations.text: A syrup and dairy mixture was observed held past its seven day date marking limit. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of flies observed in ware-washing and dry storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair: 1) The ice machine was observed with gray tape and sliding door falling off 2) Sealed wooden panels near a stainless steel table observed crumbling exposing composite wood underneath New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
The facility could not provide thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The paneling around door of ice machine 2) Storage rack next to ice machine 3) Non-food contact surfaces of CIP mixer 4) Racks in dry storage room next to main kitchen New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
The diamond plated floor in the walk-in cooler was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The wall and floor near the CIP mixer had food/debris splatter 2) Ceiling tiles in kitchen area had food splatter Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
